title: Ore Galore
description: Ore Galore.. Ever needed so many ores in your world stone becomes rare? No? Well too bad!
body:
Not to be confused with my modpack which gives the same effect as this mod.

Adds a TON of ores to the game. (which i created)

Currently in alpha phases.
Planning to add 250 ores to the game.
The end goal is to make stone rare and instead have caves be 99% ores.

This mod.. will sadly, never update. It is made in Mccreator and is very old, unportable to new versions. It will get rewritten eventually!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NSn0OSw4OqY
